notifications.title: Reach your goals with notifications

notifications.description: You will now receive notifications from CookEat!
notifications.errorDescription: An error occurred while managing notification permissions.
notifications.disabledMessage: Enable notifications in Settings > CookEat to not miss our reminders!
notifications.manualInstructionIOS: Go to Settings > CookEat > Notifications and enable 'Allow Notifications'
notifications.manualInstructionAndroid: Go to Settings > Apps > CookEat > Notifications and enable notifications

notifications.errorMessage: Unable to enable notifications. Please try again.
notifications.successMessage: Notifications have been successfully enabled. You will receive a notification 1 day before the end of your free trial.

onboarding.eatOutFrequency: How often do you eat out or order food?
onboarding.cookingTime: How much time do you have to cook?
onboarding.habitsIntro:
Did you know we waste 70kg of food per year on average? That's $250 down the drain! 💸

CookEat helps you save money.
onboarding.preferencesIntro:
Did you know the average person spends 1h a week deciding what to cook? 🤯

CookEat gives you that time back.

video.title: Film your ingredients
video.message: Film your fridge, pantry or countertop. The AI will identify all visible ingredients to suggest tailor-made recipes.

shareIntent.importingDescription: We're analyzing the video and creating your recipe. This may take a few seconds.

onboardingVideoImport.title: Import your recipes!

onboardingVideoImport.description: Simply share the video to CookEat and the AI takes care of everything: ingredients, steps, and nutritional values.
